title: INC-2024-0891
summary: High packet loss on sw-core-01. Single source IP 192.168.4.17 at 68% egress. Firewall rule added to rate-limit source. NOC escalated to security team. Duration: 23min.
root_cause: Data exfiltration attempt — confirmed by threat intel match. External dest 45.89.201.4 (known C2).
resolution: ESCALATED

title: INC-2024-1104
summary: BGP flap x4 on edge-rt-01. Peer: upstream-isp-01. Keepalive timer mismatch — local 60s, peer expected 30s. Auto-remediated with timer correction.
root_cause: BGP keepalive timer mismatch after config drift during maintenance window.
resolution: set bgp timers 30 90 on edge-rt-01

title: INC-2025-0022
summary: CPU 88% on core-sw-01. Unknown process PID 44301. Outbound connections to Tor exit nodes. Firmware compromise confirmed. Escalated to CISO. Duration: 4h.
root_cause: Crypto mining malware installed via compromised firmware update.
resolution: ESCALATED — device isolated, firmware re-flashed

title: INC-2024-0554
summary: CPU 79% on dist-sw-07. Unknown process identified as runaway SNMP poll loop triggered by misconfigured NMS. Non-critical device. Restarted SNMP agent.
root_cause: SNMP poll loop — NMS polling interval set to 1s instead of 60s.
resolution: Corrected NMS poll interval. Restarted snmpd on dist-sw-07.

title: INC-2024-0712
summary: 64% egress concentration from 10.1.4.x block on sw-access-04. False positive — bulk backup job running during business hours. Rescheduled backup job.
root_cause: Scheduled backup job consuming excess bandwidth. Not a security event.
resolution: Rescheduled backup to 02:00 maintenance window.

title: INC-2023-0988
summary: BGP instability on edge-rt-02 after maintenance window. Keepalive drift caused 3 peer resets. Resolved in 8 minutes with timer correction.
root_cause: Keepalive timer reset to default (60s) during IOS upgrade. Peer expects 30s.
resolution: set bgp timers 30 90

title: INC-2024-0233
summary: Packet loss 8% on sw-core-02. Egress distributed across 15 source IPs. Root cause: STP topology change causing brief flooding. Resolved with STP tuning.
root_cause: Spanning Tree Protocol topology change — access switch rebooted, causing MAC table flush.
resolution: Tuned STP timers. Added portfast on access ports.

title: INC-2024-0445
summary: CPU 91% on core-rt-01. Process: BGP scanner. Large BGP table (900K routes) combined with route refresh caused CPU spike. Resolved after refresh completed.
root_cause: BGP route refresh triggered by peer reset. 900K route table caused sustained CPU load during re-advertisement.
resolution: Increased BGP scanner interval. Added route dampening.

title: INC-2025-0101
summary: CPU 94% on sw-core-03. Unknown PID with Tor connections. Adjacent to INC-2025-0022 pattern. Isolated immediately. Ongoing forensic investigation.
root_cause: Suspected lateral movement from compromised core-sw-01. Same malware signature.
resolution: ESCALATED — device isolated. IR team engaged.

title: INC-2024-0677
summary: BGP flap on edge-rt-03. Peer: upstream-isp-02. Root cause: ISP-side maintenance window not communicated. BGP session recovered automatically after 12 minutes.
root_cause: ISP scheduled maintenance — BGP session intentionally reset on ISP side.
resolution: No action required. Session self-recovered.

title: INC-2024-0812
summary: Interface Gi0/3 flapping on dist-sw-03. 12 state changes in 30 minutes. Physical cable fault identified. Replaced cable, interface stable.
root_cause: Degraded SFP transceiver causing intermittent link drops.
resolution: Replaced SFP transceiver on Gi0/3.

title: INC-2024-0923
summary: CPU 87% on fw-edge-01. Root cause: DDoS mitigation module processing 2M PPS. Auto-scaled mitigation rules applied. Load returned to normal in 4 minutes.
root_cause: Volumetric DDoS targeting public VIP. Mitigation module saturated.
resolution: Applied auto-mitigation rules. Upstream scrubbing center activated.

title: INC-2024-0344
summary: Packet loss on sw-access-11. Source: printer subnet 10.2.8.0/24. Broadcast storm from misconfigured printer. Isolated VLAN, resolved.
root_cause: Faulty network printer sending broadcast storm. 180K broadcasts/min.
resolution: Isolated VLAN 80 (printer subnet). Printer firmware updated.

title: INC-2025-0044
summary: CPU 82% on core-sw-02. Process: tcam_manager. TCAM table near capacity (97%). Added ACL compression, freed 18% TCAM. CPU normalized.
root_cause: TCAM table exhaustion — too many ACL entries from security team policy push.
resolution: ACL optimization — reduced entries from 4,200 to 1,800 via consolidation.

title: INC-2024-0566
summary: BGP flap on edge-rt-01. Root cause: MTU mismatch on transit link (peer 1500, local 9000 jumbo). BGP OPEN messages dropping. Fixed MTU.
root_cause: Jumbo frame MTU mismatch between edge-rt-01 and upstream peer.
resolution: Set MTU 1500 on transit interface Gi0/0.

title: INC-2024-0199
summary: Packet loss 3% on sw-core-01. Egress spread across 40 IPs. Root cause: QoS policy misconfiguration after change window. Reverted QoS policy.
root_cause: QoS policy change applied incorrect DSCP markings, causing traffic queuing in wrong queue.
resolution: Reverted QoS policy to previous version.

title: INC-2025-0078
summary: CPU 76% on dist-sw-09. Root cause: NTP sync storm — 400 clients all syncing simultaneously after NTP server restart. CPU recovered in 6 minutes.
root_cause: NTP server restarted causing all clients to sync at once. Staggered sync not configured.
resolution: Added NTP maxpoll 10 minpoll 6 to distribute sync load.

title: INC-2024-0788
summary: Packet loss 9% on sw-core-04. Traced to single IP 172.16.44.2 at 58% egress. Threat intel: clean. Source is video surveillance system doing bulk export. Scheduled off-hours.
root_cause: Video surveillance system running bulk export during business hours — not malicious.
resolution: Rescheduled export job to 01:00 maintenance window.

title: INC-2024-0901
summary: BGP flap x6 on edge-rt-04. Root cause: memory exhaustion causing BGP process restart. Upgraded memory module.
root_cause: Device memory below BGP table requirements after route table growth.
resolution: Upgraded RAM from 8GB to 16GB. BGP stable after restart.

title: INC-2024-0102
summary: CPU 89% on core-sw-05. Process: arp_inspect. ARP inspection table overflow — 50K entries vs 32K limit. Increased ARP table limit and cleared stale entries.
root_cause: ARP inspection table overflow due to stale entries not timing out correctly.
resolution: Increased arp inspection max-entries to 64000. Cleared stale entries.

title: INC-2024-0455
summary: CPU 93% on fw-core-01. Stateful inspection table at 98% capacity — 2M concurrent sessions. Legitimate traffic spike from product launch. Added session limits.
root_cause: Product launch caused 10x normal traffic. Firewall session table exhausted.
resolution: Increased session limit to 4M. Added session rate limiting per source.

title: INC-2024-0311
summary: Packet loss on sw-access-22. Traced to VLAN 40 (IoT devices). Rogue device broadcasting malformed frames. Device isolated via port security.
root_cause: Compromised IoT device sending malformed 802.1Q frames causing switch buffer exhaustion.
resolution: Port security shutdown on Fa0/14. IoT device quarantined.

title: INC-2025-0033
summary: BGP flap on core-rt-02. Route reflector client lost session due to hold timer expiry. High CPU on RR causing delayed KEEPALIVE. Tuned RR CPU scheduling.
root_cause: Route reflector CPU overloaded, delaying BGP KEEPALIVE transmission beyond hold timer.
resolution: Reduced RR client count by adding secondary RR. CPU load dropped to 45%.

title: INC-2024-0634
summary: Interface Gi0/1 flapping on dist-sw-05. Root cause: duplex mismatch — local auto, peer hard-coded 100/full. Set both sides to auto.
root_cause: Duplex mismatch between dist-sw-05 and upstream switch. Late collisions observed.
resolution: Set interface Gi0/1 duplex auto speed auto on both sides.

title: INC-2024-0877
summary: CPU 84% on sw-core-01 during routing table update. Caused by OSPF SPF recalculation after link failure in data center. SPF timers tuned.
root_cause: OSPF SPF recalculation on large topology — 4,000 LSAs triggered rapid SPF runs.
resolution: Applied exponential SPF timers: spf-delay 50ms initial, 5s max.

title: INC-2024-0143
summary: BGP flap x2 on edge-rt-05. Traced to BGP notification: UPDATE message error — malformed AS_PATH attribute from external peer. Filtered with route-map.
root_cause: Upstream peer advertising malformed AS_PATH. BGP session reset on receipt.
resolution: Applied inbound route-map to filter malformed attributes.

title: INC-2025-0055
summary: Packet loss 5% on sw-core-03. Egress distributed — no single source dominance. Root cause: buffer exhaustion during traffic burst from batch ETL job.
root_cause: Nightly ETL job generating 40Gbps burst on 10Gbps uplink. Tail-drop on output queue.
resolution: QoS policy added for ETL traffic class. Scheduled ETL rate limiting.

title: INC-2024-0502
summary: CPU 78% on core-sw-06. Identified as spanning-tree topology change flood — 200 TCNs/min. Access switch bouncing port causing repeated MAC flush.
root_cause: Flapping access port causing continuous STP topology change notifications.
resolution: Added BPDU guard and portfast on access edge port.

title: INC-2024-0755
summary: CPU 96% on fw-edge-02. Intrusion prevention system processing signature update mid-traffic. IPS update scheduled to maintenance window.
root_cause: IPS signature update running during peak hours — CPU-intensive signature compilation.
resolution: Rescheduled IPS updates to 02:00 maintenance window.

title: INC-2024-0388
summary: Packet loss on sw-access-07. 802.1X authentication server unreachable causing auth failures and traffic drops. Restored RADIUS connectivity.
root_cause: RADIUS server unreachable due to firewall rule change blocking UDP 1812.
resolution: Restored firewall rule allowing RADIUS traffic. Auth recovered.
